---
title: "Alexander Grawe"
image: files/photo.jpg
about: 
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
---

I am a PhD candidate at the [Berlin School of Economics](https://berlinschoolofeconomics.de "Berlin School of Economics") and [DIW Berlin](https://www.diw.de/en "DIW Berlin"). I studied Economics at [Tinbergen Institute](https://tinbergen.nl/ "Tinbergen Institute") in Amsterdam (MPhil) and [Freie Universität Berlin](https://www.wiwiss.fu-berlin.de/en/index.html "Freie Universität Berlin") (B.Sc.).  
My interests are in applied microeconomics, specifically in labor, education, and inequality.

If you'd like to chat or grab a coffee, feel free to reach out anytime!

---

**Contact**   
Alexander Grawe  
DIW Berlin  
Anton-Wilhelm-Amo-Straße 58  
10117 Berlin (Mitte)  

E-Mail: [agrawe@diw.de](mailto:agrawe@diw.de)
